source_name: Northern Territory mining and petroleum royalty context
notes: Manual extract from NT Budget 2025-26 BP2. Table and text report mining and petroleum royalties together; this envelope is combined context only and must not be displayed as a petroleum-only receipt.

citation: Northern Territory Government, Budget 2025-26 Budget Paper No. 2, taxation and royalty revenue sections.

fields.display_caveat: Do not show as petroleum-only royalties. The source combines mining and petroleum royalty revenue.
